parameters.body:
=BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//NormandieEtancheite//RDV//FR
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:{{ $now.toMillis() }}@normandie-etancheite.fr
DTSTAMP:{{ $now.format('YYYYMMDDTHHmmss') }}Z
DTSTART;TZID=Europe/Paris:{{ $json.body.date.replace(/-/g, '') }}T{{ $json.body.heure.replace(':', '') }}00
DTEND;TZID=Europe/Paris:{{ $json.body.date.replace(/-/g, '') }}T{{ String(Number($json.body.heure.split(':')[0]) + 1).padStart(2, '0') + $json.body.heure.split(':')[1] }}00
SUMMARY:RDV - {{ $json.body.prenom }} {{ $json.body.nom }}
DESCRIPTION:Tel: {{ $json.body.telephone }} | Email: {{ $json.body.email }} | Adresse: {{ $json.body.adresse }} | Surface: {{ $json.body.surface_m2 }}m2 | Type: {{ $json.body.type_toiture }}
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
